For each sample, we obtained the unfiltered feature-barcode matrix per sample by passing the demultiplexed FASTQs to Cell Ranger v.3.1.0 ‘count’ command using default parameters and the prebuilt GRCh38 genome reference v.3.0.0 (GRCh38 and Ensembl 93) for scRNA.
